Hiring for contractual position of Senior AI Engineer (LLM / RAG / Agents) 3-5 Years 
Location Remote 
Pls share 9667627371
Follow for more position Nidhi Rajput

Senior AI Engineer (LLM / RAG / Agents)
📍 Remote | Contract
🕒 4 Hours EST Overlap
👨‍💻 Experience: 2–4 Years
Job Summary:
We are looking for a hands-on AI Engineer to build scalable, production-ready AI systems using LLMs, RAG pipelines, and agent-based architectures. The role involves designing intelligent workflows, optimizing performance, and ensuring reliability, observability, and cost efficiency.
Key Responsibilities:
Build and optimize LLM-based agents (planner, router, intent systems)
Develop RAG pipelines with embeddings, retrieval & reranking
Tune prompts, routing logic, and model performance
Implement evaluation metrics (accuracy, latency, quality)
Ensure observability (logs, traces, cost tracking)
Maintain secure, scalable APIs and CI/CD pipelines
Required Skills:
Strong experience with LLMs, RAG, and AI systems
Knowledge of vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.)
Proficiency in Python or Node.js
Experience with APIs, system design, and backend development
Understanding of observability, security, and performance optimization
Good to Have:
Knowledge graphs, OpenTelemetry, Kubernetes
A/B testing, evaluation frameworks, and cost optimization
If you want, I can make an even shorter 2–3 line WhatsApp/LinkedIn version for quick hiring posts.

Shreshthi D Sharma

Senior HR | Senior Recruiter (US IT & Domestic) | Talent Acquisition | HR Operations | Creative Graphic Designer

#hiring #AI #ML #Freelance 

We are excited to share an opportunity with ATF Labs for the role of Freelance AI/ML Engineer.

Position: Freelance AI/ML Engineer
Company: ATF Labs
Engagement Type: Freelance / Contract
Experience: Minimum 4 years

Key Responsibilities:

Design, develop, and deploy machine learning models and AI solutions
Work on data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model optimization
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements
Implement scalable and efficient algorithms
Monitor and improve model performance over time

Required Skills:

Strong understanding of Machine Learning and Deep Learning concepts
Hands-on experience with Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar frameworks
Experience in data analysis and handling large datasets
Knowledge of NLP, Computer Vision, or related domains is a plus
Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) is preferred

Eligibility:

min 4 years experience.
Proven experience in AI/ML projects (freelance or full-time)
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

If you are interested, please share your updated resume at shreshthi@atf-labs.com
